---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# get expect shadow

## preprocessing

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
# get classical shadows
N = 4
NU = 100
measurement_settings = [LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting(N) for _ in 1: NU];
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
ψ = random_mps(site_indices, linkdims=4);
NM = 100
measurement_group = MeasurementGroup(ψ , measurement_settings, NM);
factorized_shadows = get_factorized_shadows(measurement_group);
```

```{julia}
# swap function
function create_local_swap_op(bitsnum::Int64, localsites::Vector{Int64}, siteindices::Vector{Index{Int64}})
    ops = MPO[]
    site1 = localsites[1]
    site2 = localsites[2]
    opstrbases = ["I", "X", "Y", "Z"]
    for basesindex = 1:4
        opstrbase = opstrbases[basesindex]
        opstrs = ["I" for _ in 1:bitsnum]
        opstrs[site1], opstrs[site2] = opstrbase, opstrbase
        op = MPO(ComplexF64, siteindices, opstrs)
        push!(ops, op)
    end
    return local_swap_op = sum(ops) / 2
end
```

```{julia}
# create factorized operator type
struct FactorizedOperator
    localoperators::Vector{MPO}
    sites::Vector{Vector{Int64}}
    function FactorizedOperator(localoperators, sites)
        @assert length(localoperators) == length(sites) "The length of localoperators must equal the length of sites" # constrain.
        new(localoperators, sites)
    end
end

function create_factorized_reflect_op(bitsnum::Int64, siteindices::Vector{Index{Int64}})
    @assert iszero(bitsnum % 2) "bitsnum must be 2k, k ∈ ℕ" # constrain
    pairsnum = bitsnum ÷ 2
    factorized_reflect_op = Vector{MPO}()
    factorized_reflect_sites = Vector{Vector{Int64}}()
    for pairsite = 1:pairsnum
        site1 = pairsite
        site2 = bitsnum - site1 + 1
        pairsites = [site1, site2]
        indices = [siteindices[i] for i in pairsites]
        localoperator = create_local_swap_op(2, [1, 2], indices)
        push!(factorized_reflect_op, localoperator)
        push!(factorized_reflect_sites, pairsites)
    end
    return factorized_reflect_op, factorized_reflect_sites
end
```

```{julia}
factorized_reflect_op, factorized_reflect_sites = create_factorized_reflect_op(N, site_indices)
factorized_op = FactorizedOperator(factorized_reflect_op, factorized_reflect_sites)
```

## get expect shadow

### main context

```{julia}
function get_producted_expect_shadow(O::FactorizedOperator, measurement_group::MeasurementGroup{LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting})
    localops = O.localoperators
    sites = O.sites
    factorizednum = length(localops)
    expect_val = ComplexF64(1)
    for factorizedindex = 1:factorizednum
        localop = localops[factorizedindex]
        localsite = sites[factorizedindex]
        # take the reduced info
        reduced_group = reduce_to_subsystem(measurement_group, localsite)
        dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(reduced_group)
        local_val = get_expect_shadow(localop, dense_shadows)
        expect_val *= ComplexF64(local_val)
    end
    return expect_val
end
```

```{julia}
get_producted_expect_shadow(factorized_op, measurement_group)
```

### comparative verification

```{julia}
function create_overall_swap_op(bitsnum::Int64, siteindices::Vector{Index{Int64}})
    @assert iszero(bitsnum % 2) "bitsnum must be 2k, k ∈ ℕ" # constrain
    pairsnum = bitsnum ÷ 2
    opstrs = ["I" for _ in 1:bitsnum]
    op = MPO(ComplexF64, siteindices, opstrs)
    for pairsite = 1:pairsnum
        site1 = pairsite
        site2 = bitsnum - site1 + 1
        sites = [site1, site2]
        local_swap_op = create_local_swap_op(bitsnum, sites, siteindices)
        op = apply(local_swap_op, op)
    end
    return op
end
```

```{julia}
overall_reflect_op = create_overall_swap_op(N, site_indices)
```

```{julia}
estimate_val = get_expect_shadow(overall_reflect_op, factorized_shadows)
exact_val = inner(ψ', overall_reflect_op, ψ)
```
